## 🐛 Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## 🌍 Environment
| | |
|---|---|
| **OS** | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22 |
| **Browser** | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17 |
| **Node.js** | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| **npm/yarn** | e.g. npm 10.2.4 |
| **Project version** | e.g. 1.2.3 |

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here. Paste relevant logs below:
